description: MCP server for EAD Enterprise Suite - signatures, evidence, notifications, dossiers via AI agents.
name: io.github.g-digital-by-Garrigues/ead-enterprise-suite

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to allow plain http:// fileUrl downloads in evidence_create (default https-only). Private/internal addresses are always rejected regardless.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOW_INSECURE_FILE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed Host headers. Empty = Host validation disabled (default). When set, requests with a Host outside the list are rejected.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated allowed browser Origins (DNS-rebinding defense). Empty = reject any request carrying an Origin header; non-browser clients (CLI/SDK) send no Origin and are always allowed. Use '*' to allow all.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS

environmentVariables.description: Your EAD Enterprise Suite account email (Flow 1). Configure one of Flow 1 or Flow 2.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_EMAIL

environmentVariables.description: Your EAD Enterprise Suite account password (Flow 1, email/password accounts) (See https://www.eadtrust.eu/soluciones-legaltech/enterprise-suite/ for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTH_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Interface the HTTP transport binds to. Default 127.0.0.1 (localhost only). Set 0.0.0.0 to expose on all interfaces (containers do this automatically).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" for public/multi-tenant deployments. Activates Host validation and refuses to start unless MCP_ALLOWED_ORIGINS or MCP_ALLOWED_HOSTS is set (fail-closed).
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PUBLIC

environmentVariables.description: OpenID Connect refresh token (Flow 2) (See https://www.eadtrust.eu/soluciones-legaltech/enterprise-suite/ for credential acquisition.)
environmentVariables.name: MCP_OPENID_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: HTTP port when running in hosted (HTTP) mode; ignored in stdio mode
environmentVariables.name: PORT
